title: voiage: Reproducible Value of Information Analysis with an Authoritative Rust Core
abstract: voiage is open-source research software for reproducible Value of Information analysis. Version 1.0.0 combines a broad Python interface with authoritative Rust numerical kernels and direct C-ABI EVPI bindings for R and Julia, supported by language-neutral fixtures, structured diagnostics, and reproducible assurance gates.
comments: Draft for author review. Page and figure counts require confirmation after final typesetting.
